Question:
Solve this Super-Eywa grading-bank question.
Question ID: architecture-derived-B7-sarcasm-classification
Title: B7. Sarcasm Classification

Problem:
Classify three Reddit replies as sarcastic (0) or non-sarcastic (1).
Determine the 3-bit pattern.

Grading target:
Exact match on the 3-bit string.

Return format:
FINAL_ANSWER: <your answer>
JUSTIFICATION: <brief justification>

authored_response.decision_notes: The task requires classifying three distinct Reddit replies for sarcasm. Since the user did not provide the actual text of the replies in the prompt, the helpers are instructed to analyze the provided content (once available) to determine the 3-bit pattern.

helpers.label: sarcasm_classifier
helpers.instructions:
Analyze the following three Reddit replies provided in the context to determine if each is sarcastic (0) or non-sarcastic (1). For each reply, provide a label (0 or 1) and a very brief reason. 

Replies to evaluate:
[REPLY 1]
[REPLY 2]
[REPLY 3]

authored_response.synthesis_brief:
The parent should take the 0/1 labels provided by the helper for Reply 1, Reply 2, and Reply 3, concatenate them into a single 3-bit string (e.g., '010'), and format the output as: 
FINAL_ANSWER: <3-bit string>
JUSTIFICATION: <summary of the classification logic applied to the three replies>.
